MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUEVARA, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, GAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, GLORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPIT TRANSIT DISTRICT, DEFENDANTS CONSENT TO THE AMENDMENT, WAIVE SERVICE AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT GAIL MURRAY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
